The Tri-Titan.

Yet another thing following the format of an episode.. This time, your fighting the Tri-titan, it is a CRP bot, so it should be able to stand to your attacks and fight back, alert me if it doesn’t, I’ll make this harder...

Tri-titan is so cool...
